# Twilio Content Template Builder

## Twilio Content Template Builder

Create and send rich messaging content over any Twilio-supported channel with the Content Template Builder.

Content Templates give you a consistent framework across channels and abstract channel-specific implementation details.

The Content API enables programmatic creation and management of Content Templates. The Content Template Builder includes a Console UI that is built on the Content API. With the UI, you can create, approve, and manage templates directly in the Console.

[Launch Content Template Builder](https://console.twilio.com/us1/develop/sms/content-editor)

## Tutorial

```text !sample
Send templates you create in the Console from your app
```

1. Content Templates are normalized templates across channels such as WhatsApp, RCS, Facebook Messenger, MMS, and SMS
2. Send templates created in the Twilio Console from your app
3. Create engaging, interactive messaging experiences

Tutorial code output: "Power engaging interactive conversational messaging experiences"

## Get started

Use the Content API Quickstart or launch the Content Template Builder to get started:

### Get started

* [Content Templates overview](/docs/content/overview)
* [Create templates with the Content Template Builder in Console](/docs/content/create-templates-with-the-content-template-builder)
* [Content Template Builder in Twilio Console](https://console.twilio.com/us1/develop/sms/content-editor)
* [Content API Quickstart](/docs/content/create-and-send-your-first-content-api-template)

## Create and manage your templates

Create your first template with the Content Template Builder. Preview template types, select rich features, and build templates that work on all supported channels.

Manage your templates through the Content Template Builder. Submit templates for WhatsApp approval, monitor approval statuses, delete templates, or duplicate them.

### Getting started

* [Overview](/docs/content/overview)

### Create and manage templates

* [Create your templates](/docs/content/create-templates-with-the-content-template-builder)
* [Manage your templates](/docs/content/manage-your-templates-with-the-content-template-builder)

### Additional resources

* [Content types overview](/docs/content/content-types-overview)
* [Channel eligibility badge legend](/docs/content/eligibility-badge-legend)
* [Session definitions](/docs/content/session-definitions)

## Send your templates

You can send templates created with the Content API over WhatsApp, RCS, Facebook Messenger, SMS, and MMS, depending on channel availability.

Send your templates with the Twilio Programmable Messaging API, Studio, or Conversations. Content Templates are also available in Engage.

### Start sending templates

* [How to send templates created with the Content Template Builder](/docs/content/send-templates-created-with-the-content-template-builder)

## Related Products

You can also manage templates through the Content API and send them with the Programmable Messaging API.

### Content API

You can use the Content API to programmatically create templates and access API-only features.

[Product Docs](/docs/content)

### Twilio Programmable Messaging API

Use the Programmable Messaging API to send templates you create with the Content Template Builder across multiple channels.

[Product Docs](/docs/messaging)
